headlines.headline: Why Stephen A. likes Luka, Cunningham being eligible for end-of-season awards
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith, Kenny Smith and Chris "Mad Dog" Russo react to news of Luka Doncic and Cade Cunningham being granted an exception to be eligible for end-of-season awards.

headlines.headline: Damon Jones to plead guilty to providing bettors with inside info
headlines.description: Damon Jones plans to plead guilty to charges he provided sports bettors with nonpublic information about injuries to stars LeBron James and Anthony Davis, ABC News reported Thursday, citing a court filing.

headlines.headline: 2025-26 NBA championship odds: Thunder, Celtics favored in respective conferences
headlines.description: The Thunder and Celtics are the favorites to represent their conferences in the NBA Finals.

headlines.headline: Luka Doncic, Cade Cunningham eligible for NBA season awards
headlines.description: Luka Doncic and Cade Cunningham are eligible for season honors after their challenge of the 65-game rule was approved, while Anthony Edwards' challenge was declined.

headlines.headline: Chris Paul trolls Clippers after LA loses in play-in tournament
headlines.description: The LA Clippers had their season end Wednesday night, and an ex-Clipper made sure to rub salt in the wound.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: Philly fans will regret chanting ‘We want Boston’
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith details why the 76ers won’t beat the Celtics in the first round of the playoffs.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Philadelphia Eagles updates, intel, buzz
headlines.description: The Eagles pick late in Round 1 and have nine total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what Philadelphia might do.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest New England Patriots updates, intel, buzz
headlines.description: The Patriots pick late in Round 1 and have 11 total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what New England might do.

headlines.headline: Woody: Jayden Daniels and Jeremiyah Love would be 'terrifying' together
headlines.description: Damien Woody and Dan Graziano talk about how Jeremiyah Love would fit on the Commanders.

headlines.headline: UFL tweaks OT rule after bizarre Storm-Kings finish
headlines.description: Coaches, players -- even the refs -- seemed confused when a rule few understood gave Orlando the win.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Cincinnati Bengals updates, intel, buzz
headlines.description: The Bengals are set to pick No. 10 and have eight total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what Cincy might do.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: How all 32 teams can ace their picks, needs
headlines.description: A week before the NFL draft, Ben Solak hits the top priorities for every single team -- and the prospects who can meet those needs.

headlines.headline: Alex Ovechkin: 'I'm pretty sure it's not my last game'
headlines.description: Alex Ovechkin says he's pretty sure the Capitals' season finale against the Blue Jackets was not his last game, but he still has to make the decision on his future.

headlines.headline: Auston Matthews remains noncommittal on his future in Toronto
headlines.description: Maple Leafs captain Auston Matthews said Thursday that he "can't predict the future" when asked whether he expects to be back with Toronto next season.

headlines.headline: Capitals' Alex Ovechkin 'pretty sure' he'll play 22nd season
headlines.description: Capitals star Alex Ovechkin, the NHL's all-time leading goal scorer, said he's "pretty sure" that Tuesday's season finale won't be his last game as he ponders retirement.

headlines.headline: NHL playoff watch: What's at stake on the season's final day
headlines.description: There are six games left to finalize playoff seeding and draft lottery order. Here's a rundown of what's on tap.

headlines.headline: Jets bring losing streak into game against the Sharks
headlines.description: San Jose Sharks (38-35-8, in the Pacific Division) vs. Winnipeg Jets (35-34-12, in the Central Division)

headlines.headline: Seattle tries to stop road losing streak, visits Colorado
headlines.description: Seattle Kraken (34-36-11, in the Pacific Division) vs. Colorado Avalanche (54-16-11, in the Central Division)

satire_angles.description: The New England Patriots got absolutely destroyed
